title: Memory Usage Title
description: Show memory usage in title bar
body:
# Memory Usage Title ![Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YvaL4yx6/images/e857db914864610383d3f99ce37af9a11402c47d.png) ## Description Displays Minecraft's memory usage in the title bar.
I created this because I wanted to display it in a place where it was easy to see without getting in the way.

Mod Loader: Fabric Loader, Minecraft Forge Loader
License: MIT License
Modpack: Useable
